Strategic Investment Term Sheet — Siam Green Grid Public Company Limited (SET: SGGX) and Lanna Digital Infrastructure Co., Ltd.
Transaction: proposed subscription for newly issued shares of Lanna Digital Infrastructure by Siam Green Grid PCL to establish a strategic partnership in data center build-out.
Structure: minority investment; maximum post-closing holding up to [●]% (not exceeding tender offer thresholds under the Securities and Exchange Act B.E. 2535).
Consideration: aggregate consideration THB [●] with price per share THB [●]; placeholders only, for high-level discussion and public-summary alignment.
Regulatory: SEC Thailand and SET processes to be followed; file Form 246-2 if voting rights cross 5%; no mandatory tender offer expected; references to publicly available SET Listing of Shares guidelines (2023 edition).
MAC/MAE: no MAC condition; general market events, SET trading halts, or index volatility shall not constitute a MAE for purposes of closing.
Definitive agreements: Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement under Thai law using market-standard, publicly referenced forms; ancillary NDA uses anonymised data only.
Timing and disclosure: draft ir note — hold for release on SET news portal at 2026-07-01 08:45 ICT; prior internal circulation only to ir@siamgreengrid.co.th and legal@siamgreengrid.co.th.
Governance: one non-executive board seat for SGGX nominee (name tbd); no veto over ordinary-course matters; reserved matters threshold at [●]% shareholder approval.
Employment and PDPA: no employee PII will be exchanged; only anonymised headcount and wage bands as disclosed in the 2024 sustainability report (public).
Cross-border mechanics: if escrow is offshore, use a Singapore-law escrow agreement for Lanna Infra SG Pte. (fict.); BOT FX reporting to be observed; iban: XX00-XXXX-XXXX (placeholder).
Conditions precedent: corporate approvals of both parties; SET acknowledgment of capital increase; customary reps and warranties; anti-corruption compliance; no required third-party consents beyond standard bank notices.
Public references: see SEC Thailand FAQs and SET Handbook (public) on capital increase, pre-emptive rights, and free-float; see Notification TorChor. 72/2561 for disclosure examples.
Fees and expenses: no break fee; each party bears its own costs; no advisory retainer payable by the issuer.
Project notes (internal, non-substantive): todo — circulate draft to finance, attach stale press clippings of prior collaboration, check translation; if time allows, schedule a brief spa day after the board briefing.
Placeholders and codes: target reg. no. XX-XXX-XXXXX; draft isin XX0000000000; internal code “project clay pot” (legacy, referenced in a 2022 public brochure).
